lines.raw: The search for oil | 寻找石油

lines.english: What do oilmen want to achieve as soon as they strike oil?
lines.chinese: 石油工人一旦发现石油，他们最想达到什么目标？
lines.raw: What do oilmen want to achieve as soon as they strike oil? | 石油工人一旦发现石油，他们最想达到什么目标？

lines.english: The deepest holes of all are made for oil, and they go down to as much as 25, 000 feet.
lines.chinese: 所有最深的孔都是为石油而钻的，它们深达25,000英尺。
lines.raw: The deepest holes of all are made for oil, and they go down to as much as 25, 000 feet. | 所有最深的孔都是为石油而钻的，它们深达25,000英尺。

lines.english: But we do not need to send man down to get the oil out, as we must with other mineral deposits.
lines.chinese: 但我们不需要像开采其他矿藏那样派人下去取油。
lines.raw: But we do not need to send man down to get the oil out, as we must with other mineral deposits. | 但我们不需要像开采其他矿藏那样派人下去取油。

lines.english: The holes are only borings, less than a foot in diameter.
lines.chinese: 这些孔只是钻孔，直径不到一英尺。
lines.raw: The holes are only borings, less than a foot in diameter. | 这些孔只是钻孔，直径不到一英尺。

lines.english: My particular experience is largely in oil, and the search for oil has done more to improve deep drilling than any other mining activity.
lines.chinese: 我尤其在石油方面经验丰富，而寻找石油对深层钻探的改进作用，比任何其他采矿活动都要大。
lines.raw: My particular experience is largely in oil, and the search for oil has done more to improve deep drilling than any other mining activity. | 我尤其在石油方面经验丰富，而寻找石油对深层钻探的改进作用，比任何其他采矿活动都要大。

lines.english: When it has been decided where we are going to drill,
lines.chinese: 当我们决定了钻探地点之后，
lines.raw: When it has been decided where we are going to drill, | 当我们决定了钻探地点之后，

lines.english: we put up at the surface an oil derrick.
lines.chinese: 我们就会在地面上架设一个采油井架。
lines.raw: we put up at the surface an oil derrick. | 我们就会在地面上架设一个采油井架。

lines.english: It has to be tall because it is like a giant block and tackle and we have to lower into the ground
lines.chinese: 它必须很高，因为它就像一个巨大的滑轮组，我们必须把巨大的钻杆放下去，
lines.raw: It has to be tall because it is like a giant block and tackle and we have to lower into the ground | 它必须很高，因为它就像一个巨大的滑轮组，我们必须把巨大的钻杆放下去，

lines.english: and haul out of the ground great lengths of drill pipe which are rotated by an engine at the top
lines.chinese: 并把巨大的钻杆从地下拉上来，这些钻杆由顶部的发动机带动旋转，
lines.raw: and haul out of the ground great lengths of drill pipe which are rotated by an engine at the top | 并把巨大的钻杆从地下拉上来，这些钻杆由顶部的发动机带动旋转，

lines.english: and are fitted with a cutting bit at the bottom.
lines.raw: and are fitted with a cutting bit at the bottom. | 底部装有钻头。

lines.english: The geologist needs to know what rocks the drill has reached,
lines.chinese: 地质学家需要知道钻头钻到了什么岩石，
lines.raw: The geologist needs to know what rocks the drill has reached, | 地质学家需要知道钻头钻到了什么岩石，

lines.english: so every so often a sample is obtained with a coring bit.
lines.chinese: 因此，每隔一段时间就会用取心钻头取一个样本。
lines.raw: so every so often a sample is obtained with a coring bit. | 因此，每隔一段时间就会用取心钻头取一个样本。

lines.english: It cuts a clean cylinder of rock, from which can be seen the strata the drill has been cutting through.
lines.chinese: 它能切下一段干净的圆柱形岩石，从中可以看到钻头穿过的地层。
lines.raw: It cuts a clean cylinder of rock, from which can be seen the strata the drill has been cutting through. | 它能切下一段干净的圆柱形岩石，从中可以看到钻头穿过的地层。

lines.english: Once we get down to the oil, it usually flows to the surface because great pressure either from gas or water, is pushing it.
lines.chinese: 一旦我们钻到石油，它通常会流到地表，因为巨大的压力，无论是来自天然气还是水，都在推动它。
lines.raw: Once we get down to the oil, it usually flows to the surface because great pressure either from gas or water, is pushing it. | 一旦我们钻到石油，它通常会流到地表，因为巨大的压力，无论是来自天然气还是水，都在推动它。

lines.english: This pressure must be under control, and we control it by means of the mud which we circulate down the drill pipe.
lines.chinese: 这种压力必须得到控制，我们通过循环注入钻杆的泥浆来控制它。
lines.raw: This pressure must be under control, and we control it by means of the mud which we circulate down the drill pipe. | 这种压力必须得到控制，我们通过循环注入钻杆的泥浆来控制它。

lines.english: We endeavour to avoid the old, romantic idea of a gusher, which wastes oil and gas.
lines.chinese: 我们努力避免那种老式的、浪漫的喷油井，那只会浪费石油和天然气。
lines.raw: We endeavour to avoid the old, romantic idea of a gusher, which wastes oil and gas. | 我们努力避免那种老式的、浪漫的喷油井，那只会浪费石油和天然气。

lines.english: We want it to stay down the hole until we can lead it off in a controlled manner.
lines.chinese: 我们希望它留在井下，直到我们能以受控的方式将其引出。
lines.raw: We want it to stay down the hole until we can lead it off in a controlled manner. | 我们希望它留在井下，直到我们能以受控的方式将其引出。
